narrative:
Greenhills A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 597 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
